title: Safer updates, clearer billing, and import/export progress
summary: This release improves day-to-day POS reliability and gives staff clearer guidance when the system updates.
highlights: Automatic update detection now prompts staff with a guided update dialog.
Current cart, bills, stock, recipes, settings, and drafts are saved locally before updating.
Bill numbers and exported bill files are easier to identify date-wise.
Import and export actions now show progress so staff know the system is working.
Inventory and Recipe Maker sync is safer for multi-branch/outlet data.
